name: Astralune
concept: a mythical moonlit unicorn whose quiet starlight matures into a radiant celestial guardian
stageDescriptions: a small graceful unicorn foal with a short opal spiral horn, compact quadruped proportions, a soft starlight mane, a crescent marking on its shoulder, and a gentle curious face
a majestic adult unicorn with a long opal spiral horn, elegant but sturdy quadruped proportions, a flowing celestial mane and tail, the same crescent shoulder marking, and the same gentle face
habitat: a moonlit meadow beneath a clear field of stars
